how_computed: Percentage of gold endpoints where the agent's recorded response matches the gold reference on ALL of: real response class (actual_class), documented_schema flag, conformance verdict, validation_error_count, AND the agent correctly reported whether a JSON response schema is documented for the matched response key (schema_claim_correct). An endpoint the agent did not cover (no usable request produced) counts as a mismatch. Denominator = all gold endpoints.
rationale: The headline Schema Conformance Rate = (responses with zero ajv errors / responses validated) x 100, pass=100%. Under the current spec NO endpoint documents a response schema, so 0 responses are validated and the conformance rate is N/A for ALL four agents — it cannot separate them. Fidelity-to-gold instead measures each framework's test quality: full coverage of the 22 endpoints, a correctly constructed valid request that elicits the real success status (right method/path/body/auth), faithful recording, and honest gap reporting (correctly stating has_json_schema=false rather than hallucinating a schema or a conformance verdict). The N/A conformance rate is itself the headline QA finding: response schemas are undocumented and must be authored before conformance can be measured.
